title: Land the contribution under a name the distribution accepts, and prove all three gates green
action: Adopt PR #50's files into this repo under D1/D2. The PR branch is fetchable as `gh pr diff 50` (full diff already saved at `.bee/tmp/pr50/full.diff`); take the 9 files from `skills/herdr-orchestrating/`. STEP 1 — RED FIRST, capture it: with the files placed under their CONTRIBUTED name, run `node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check` and `node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash` and quote the refusal verbatim — it is `release inventory names an unsafe managed skill: herdr-orchestrating` from `skills/bee-hive/scripts/plugin_distribution.mjs:135`, NOT a manifest hash mismatch. This capture is the evidence that the rename is mandatory rather than cosmetic; do not skip it. STEP 2 — rename the directory to `skills/bee-herding/` and rewrite every internal reference: the skill's own frontmatter `name`, every path inside SKILL.md, README.md and the three references/*.md, and — critically — `bootstrap-cockpit.sh`'s hardcoded skill-root path, which the review found resolves `.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/...` and would break Codex AND abort every run in this repo. While there, fix that path to resolve from the script's own location (`BASH_SOURCE`/`$SCRIPT_DIR`, exactly as `control-loop.sh` already does) rather than hardcoding either runtime root. STEP 3 — regenerate in this order, never the reverse: `node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs`, then `node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write`, then `node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply`. STEP 4 — prove THREE gates independently green and quote each: `node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check`, `node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash`, `node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs`. The manifest going green does NOT imply the other two (D2) — the review established the manifest is the messenger, and the installer suite regenerates its own manifest in a staged copy, so it fails for the NAME, not the hash. Confirm the rendered trees now actually contain the skill (`ls .claude-plugin/skills/` and `.codex-plugin/skills/`) — as contributed it was filtered out by the render's `/^bee-/` and shipped to nobody. STEP 5 — D9: the skill cites eighteen decisions from `docs/history/agent-pane-orchestration/` which does not exist here. Strip those citations or replace them with what is actually true in this repo; an unresolvable 'why' reads as though a reason exists. Also scrub the contributor's absolute home paths from the two evidence references. Do NOT yet touch the shell hardening or the tool posture — those are h-2 and h-3.

truths: red evidence: the contributed name refused by the distribution preflight, quoted verbatim, showing it is a NAME refusal not a hash mismatch
green evidence: release_manifest --check, test_installers_e2e --installer bash, and test_skill_render all quoted green INDEPENDENTLY
the rendered plugin trees demonstrably contain the skill after the rename (they did not before)
bootstrap resolves its own skill root from the script location — no hardcoded .claude/ or .agents/
no citation remains pointing at a history directory that does not exist here, and no contributor absolute paths remain
node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 AND BEE_AGENT_NAME=w-test node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0
prohibitions: never regenerate the manifest before the rename — alone it fixes nothing and hides the real refusal
never relax the ^bee- constraint in plugin_distribution.mjs or the render filter to accommodate the skill — the constraint is the protection
do not fix the shell defects or change the permission posture here (h-2, h-3)
do not reconcile the backlog format — while the formats disagree the loop selects nothing, which is the SAFE failure (CONTEXT out-of-scope)

trace.dropped_reason: superseded by the advisor consult: merge demoted to a gesture (D11), interlock added (D10), hardening moved ahead of the shipping switch (D3-REVISED) — the original cell's shape no longer matches the plan
